verses.text: I have told you, lest ye stumble; they shall cast you out and 'think that he doeth God service.' Forewarned. Persecution will even claim to honour God.
I have told you, lest ye stumble; they shall cast you out and 'think that he doeth God service.' Forewarned. Persecution will even claim to honour God.
I have told you, lest ye stumble; they shall cast you out and 'think that he doeth God service.' Forewarned. Persecution will even claim to honour God.
I have told you, lest ye stumble; they shall cast you out and 'think that he doeth God service.' Forewarned. Persecution will even claim to honour God.
'It is expedient for you that I go away,' for the Comforter will then come. Better His going. Christ's departure opens the way for the Spirit.
'It is expedient for you that I go away,' for the Comforter will then come. Better His going. Christ's departure opens the way for the Spirit.
'It is expedient for you that I go away,' for the Comforter will then come. Better His going. Christ's departure opens the way for the Spirit.
He shall reprove the world 'of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment.' The Spirit's work. He convicts the world and convinces of truth.
He shall reprove the world 'of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment.' The Spirit's work. He convicts the world and convinces of truth.
He shall reprove the world 'of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment.' The Spirit's work. He convicts the world and convinces of truth.
He shall reprove the world 'of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment.' The Spirit's work. He convicts the world and convinces of truth.
The Spirit of truth 'will guide you into all truth' and show things to come. Promised guidance. The Spirit leads the church into Christ's truth.
The Spirit of truth 'will guide you into all truth' and show things to come. Promised guidance. The Spirit leads the church into Christ's truth.
He shall glorify Me, taking of Mine and showing it to you. Christ exalted. The Spirit's office is to magnify the Son.
He shall glorify Me, taking of Mine and showing it to you. Christ exalted. The Spirit's office is to magnify the Son.
'A little while, and ye shall not see me'; the disciples wonder. Puzzled. They cannot yet grasp His going and return.
'A little while, and ye shall not see me'; the disciples wonder. Puzzled. They cannot yet grasp His going and return.
'A little while, and ye shall not see me'; the disciples wonder. Puzzled. They cannot yet grasp His going and return.
Your sorrow shall be 'turned into joy'; as a woman after travail, none shall take your joy. Lasting joy. Grief gives way to a joy none can steal.
Your sorrow shall be 'turned into joy'; as a woman after travail, none shall take your joy. Lasting joy. Grief gives way to a joy none can steal.
Your sorrow shall be 'turned into joy'; as a woman after travail, none shall take your joy. Lasting joy. Grief gives way to a joy none can steal.
Your sorrow shall be 'turned into joy'; as a woman after travail, none shall take your joy. Lasting joy. Grief gives way to a joy none can steal.
Ask the Father in My name, and ye shall receive, 'that your joy may be full.' Answered prayer. Praying in His name brings fullness of joy.
Ask the Father in My name, and ye shall receive, 'that your joy may be full.' Answered prayer. Praying in His name brings fullness of joy.
'The Father himself loveth you, because ye have loved me.' Loved of God. The Father's love rests on those who love His Son.
'The Father himself loveth you, because ye have loved me.' Loved of God. The Father's love rests on those who love His Son.
'The Father himself loveth you, because ye have loved me.' Loved of God. The Father's love rests on those who love His Son.
I came from the Father and go to the Father; now they believe. Plain at last. His words clear their understanding.
I came from the Father and go to the Father; now they believe. Plain at last. His words clear their understanding.
I came from the Father and go to the Father; now they believe. Plain at last. His words clear their understanding.
Ye shall be scattered, yet I am not alone; 'in the world ye shall have tribulation: but... I have overcome the world.' Sure victory. Christ's triumph is the believer's peace.
